summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of the multi-tenant hyperlocal commerce SaaS refactor. 35/35 backend pytest cases pass on the new multi-tenant API surface (storefront, orders, tracking, auth, master, vendor with role-scope 403s). Frontend Playwright covers: (1) StorefrontHome -> /menu -> category list -> ProductList; (2) cart with liquor minimum warning + disabled checkout under ₹1000 + enabled when raised above; (3) Checkout UPI happy path: rejects empty/short upi5 and stays on /checkout, accepts 5 digits then redirects to /confirmation showing 'Payment under review' + ORD- short_id + Track button; (4) Track page polling with status pipeline; (5) Master login -> /admin/master, vendors list shows seeded 'Sharma Wines & More', Add Vendor modal creates a vendor and credentials modal exposes <slug>@vendor.local + <slug>123; (6) Vendor login -> /admin, dashboard shows store, store-toggle-btn flips store_status and storefront availability flips accordingly via /api/storefront/{slug}; (7) /admin/orders shows 6+ orders with UPI/COD badges; /admin/products lists 54 demo products; /admin/store has working settings form. All role-isolation 403/401 contracts verified via pytest. Old single-vendor test files were obsolete and have been retired (.bak).

issues: OPENS AT / CLOSES AT use the browser's native <input type="time"> picker rather than a shadcn TimePicker. Acceptable for MVP but inconsistent with the dark-themed shadcn surface.

action_items: (optional) Replace native time inputs in AdminStore.jsx with a shadcn time picker component to match the rest of the dark UI.
(carryover from prior iter, low) Checkout.jsx: when items.length === 0 it calls navigate inside render — wrap in useEffect to silence React 'setState during render' warning.
(code review) server.py still uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager.
critical_code_review_comments: Order placement endpoint is correctly idempotent on its UPI 5-digit gate: re.fullmatch(r'\d{5}', upi_last5) and rejects with 400 when missing or invalid. Verified.
Per-vendor short_id sequence uses find_one_and_update with $inc (server.py:302) — atomic and tenant-isolated. Good.
Vendor PATCH /api/vendor/store correctly strips subscription_active/subscription_expires_at so vendor cannot self-grant subscription. Verified by test_vendor_cannot_set_subscription.
Master DELETE /api/master/vendors/{vid} is a soft-delete (subscription_active=false). Storefront then returns available=false with reason. Reactivation via PATCH works. Good.

Tracking endpoint exposes customer_phone-less response (good privacy), but it still returns full delivery_address and customer_name to anyone who has the 16-hex token. 16 hex = 64 bits which is fine for unguessable tokens; document this in API.
Cart clears when slug changes (CartProvider.bindSlug) — verified manually that switching from sharma-wines/menu to a non-existent slug zero's the cart. Good.

AdminStore.jsx still shows store-toggle-btn even on /admin/store; ensure single source of truth (it currently calls /api/vendor/store with store_status = open|closed). No bug — just keep it consistent with the dashboard toggle.
Frontend storefront route renders 4 categories regardless of whether a category has 0 products in this vendor; consider hiding empty categories from /menu to avoid empty category pages.
test_credentials: Master: master@localcommerce.in / master123. Vendor: sharma-wines@vendor.local / sharma-wines123. Both verified.
seed_data_creation: Test runs created: ~5 'TEST_*' orders (TEST_UpiOK, TEST_COD, TEST_Trans, TEST_UI_Cust placed via UI) plus ~2 master-created vendors with prefix 'test-<hex>' from create-then-deactivate test. Vendor-side TEST_VendorProd created and deleted per test. No production data altered. Demo store left in 'open' state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant API base layout: Public: /api/storefront/{slug}, /api/orders (POST), /api/track/{token}. Master (Bearer + role=master_admin): /api/master/{stats|vendors|orders}. Vendor (Bearer + role=vendor_admin): /api/vendor/{me|stats|store|orders|products|categories|subgroups}. JWT in localStorage 'lc_admin_token'. 7 order states: payment_verification_pending -> payment_verified -> accepted -> out_for_delivery -> delivered (terminal: rejected, cancelled). UPI orders start at payment_verification_pending; COD at accepted. Liquor min order ₹1000 enforced server-side. Demo vendor 'sharma-wines' has 54 seeded products and slug-bound cart resets via CartProvider.bindSlug. Test_multitenant.py is the canonical regression suite.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing tests; refactor is functioning end-to-end.
